hindi: आरती गौ माता की, जय जय गौ माता। तेतीस कोटि देव जिनमें हैं विद्यमाना॥
english: Aarti of the sacred cow mother; thirty-three crore deities are present within her
roman: Aarti Gau Mata Ki, Jai Jai Gau Mata, Teetees Koti Dev Jinmein Hain Vidyamana

hindi: दूध, दही, घी देती, यज्ञ में काम आती। पंचगव्य से पवित्र, सब कलुष मिटाती॥
english: She gives milk, curd and ghee, useful in yagnas; the sacred five products (Panchagavya) purify and remove all sins
roman: Doodh Dahi Ghee Deti Yagna Mein Kaam Aati, Panchgavya Se Pavitra Sab Kalush Mitaati

english: Victory to the sacred cow mother

hindi: गोमुख से गंगा निकली, सब पाप हर लाई। कामधेनु के वंशज, सब मनोकामना पाई॥
english: From the cow-mouth Ganga emerged, washing away all sins; descendants of Kamadhenu, all desires are fulfilled
roman: Gomukh Se Ganga Nikli Sab Paap Har Laai, Kamadhenu Ke Vanshaj Sab Manokamna Paai

english: Victory to the sacred cow mother

hindi: गौ माता की आरती जो कोई भक्त गावे। गौ सेवा का फल मिले, मोक्ष द्वार पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the aarti of Gau Mata; receives the fruit of cow-service and finds the door to liberation
roman: Gau Mata Ki Aarti Jo Koi Bhakt Gaave, Gau Seva Ka Phal Mile Moksha Dwar Paave

hindi: आरती गौ माता की, जय जय गौ माता॥
english: Aarti of the sacred cow mother
roman: Aarti Gau Mata Ki, Jai Jai Gau Mata
